changelog: New theme: "Top Disney Movies of All Time" — 200+ titles spanning Walt Disney Animation, Pixar, Golden-Age classics, Pirates, live-action remakes, Muppets, Star Wars and Marvel. Tile shows the iconic Lion King hero backdrop.
Update prompt: Dismiss button on the install stage so you can back out if you cancel the system installer.
Continue Watching: Are-you-done prompt, Clear All, tombstone deletion, 14-day prune, auto-focus, orphan blank-card auto-clean.
